title: incorrect window displaying at scaling 250%
author: philinp
body_snippet:
## Expected Behavior
correct window displaying at scaling 250%

## Current Behavior
incorrect window displaying at scaling 250%
can't see settings below "auto save time in minutes".
see the screenshot below.

## Possible Solution

## Steps to Reproduce (for bugs)
run program, open Options->Connections

## Context

## Your Environment
* Version used: mRemoteNG-Installer-1.77.3.nb-1784.msi, 20230303 Nightly build.
* Operating System and version (e.g. Windows 10 1709 x64): Windows ...

iterations.description: Issue has no reproduction steps or body content, was tagged as known-unfixable in .NET 6 but potentially improved in .NET 8+, and needs retest on current fork build to determine if still valid.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: What know issue and not solvable in .net 6 codebase - we already tried hard. However on .net 8 this seems to be much better done by Microsoft so once we move to new release branch that will be priority number 1

comments.author: robertpopa22
